title: The Troubled Life of Miss Kotoura
sourceNotes: Single season, 12 episodes. Manga complete at 39 chapters (7 volumes, 2010-2015) — a 4-koma gag/comedy series. The anime restructures the material into its own continuous, more dramatic narrative (e.g. the confession/reconciliation beat lands in the finale, versus as early as Ch. 3 in the manga), so episode-to-chapter correspondence is not sequential. 4-koma source — chapter ranges are approximate.
